# GenerateAI.dev

> AI development platform to learn, build, and deploy LLMs, RAG systems, and AI agents with curated learning paths, 2,400+ prompts, and production-ready tools.

GenerateAI.dev helps developers master generative AI through interactive learning paths, hands-on labs, and a battle-tested prompt library. The platform includes a RAG lab, agent playground, and AI chat copilot.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Platform overview and featured tools.
- [Learning Paths](/paths): Role-based curricula for AI development.
- [Prompt Library](/prompts): 2,400+ curated prompts for AI tasks.
- [RAG Lab](/rag-lab): Interactive retrieval-augmented generation playground.
- [Agents](/agents): Build and test AI agents.
- [AI Chat](/enhanced-ai): Multi-model AI copilot.
- [Pricing](/subscription): Subscription plans and limits.
- [Documentation](/docs): Guides, tutorials, and API references.
- [API Reference](/api): API endpoints and usage.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on AI development.
- [About](/about): Company mission and team.
- [Community](/community): Developer community hub.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch.

## Optional

- [Careers](/careers): Open roles.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Cookies](/cookies): Cookie policy.
